text: The Align legging in medium runs small and I had to return it for a large.
Love the Everywhere Belt Bag, perfect size for travel and holds my phone and keys.
Scuba Hoodie is cozy but the medium was tight in the shoulders, sent it back.
Metal Vent Tech Tee is great for hot yoga, very breathable and no odor.
Deuxieme achat du legging Align, la taille M taille petit selon moi.
